_comment: COORD-131 mutation dimension — FIRST scored baseline on the engine. repoRoot for mutation-policy.js detectTool is this dir (coord/), because the Stryker binary installs at coord/node_modules/.bin/stryker (devDep in coord/package.json) and detectTool requires config + binary at the SAME root. All paths here are relative to coord/ (Stryker's cwd). TARGET SET INTENTIONALLY SCOPED to the highest-value core module first (journal.js — the hash-chain integrity core). It EXPANDS over time as the maturity evolution proceeds: add scripts/plan-records.js, then scripts/governance-validation.js in later passes. The command runner re-runs the test command once PER MUTANT, so we run ONLY the matching test file to keep the baseline minutes, not hours.
